name: Blackeye Peas Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups water or broth for sauteing
1 15 oz can peeled tomatoes, drained (or equivalent amount of fresh tomatoes, about 1.5 cups)
1 15 oz can black eye peas, drained
2 cups cooked white rice (a mixture of white and brown basmati)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion and saute it in a large frying pan with the water or broth.
2. Add the canned tomatoes (or fresh tomatoes) and cook until they are soft.
3. Stir in the black eye peas, rice, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
4. Heat through for about 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve as a main course casserole.
Makes about 3-4 servings.
